conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Apartment hunting again -- it's between a downtown loft, a house out in the suburbs, and an old-town walk-up.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: There's construction starting on the street outside my building.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The downtown loft is closest to work but the rent is noticeably higher than the other two.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My upstairs neighbor had some furniture delivered today, lots of noise.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The suburb house has way more space but the commute would be almost an hour each way.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My favorite coffee shop is testing a new seasonal drink.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to renew my passport, it's expiring in a few months.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The office is switching to a new time-tracking tool next month.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The old-town walk-up is smaller than the house but it's a short walk to work and has access to the building's roof deck.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Passport renewal apparently takes longer than it used to, going to submit that soon.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My phone's storage is almost full again, need to clear out old photos.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Toured the old-town walk-up in person, the rooftop actually has a really nice view of the skyline.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: The weather's been unusually warm for this time of year.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Still going back and forth between the space in the suburbs and the location of the walk-up.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My coworker recommended a good tailor near the office, need to check that out.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Realized the suburb commute would eat close to two extra hours a day, which adds up fast.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Signed the lease on the old-town walk-up. The rooftop access and the short commute made up for the smaller square footage compared to the suburb house.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Move-in is scheduled for the middle of next month.

query: Which apartment did the user decide to rent?
